name: Biscotti Di Prat (Tuscan Almond Biscotti)
recipeIngredient: 1 2/3 cups Almonds, whole; blanched and toasted lightly (chopped coarsely)
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bowl of an electric mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, blend together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs, yolks, vanilla, and almond extract. Add this mixture to the flour mixture and beat until a dough forms. Stir in the chopped toasted almonds.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead several times. Divide into fourths.
4. Working on two large buttered and floured baking sheets, form each piece of dough into a flattish log, about 11 inches long and 2 inches wide. Arrange the logs at least 3 inches apart on the sheets.
5. Brush the logs with egg wash.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 35 minutes. Let cool on the baking sheets on racks for 10 minutes.
7. On a cutting board, cut each log into diagonal slices of about 1/4 inch thick. Arrange the biscotti, cut sides down, back onto the baking sheets.
8. Bake in the preheated oven at 350°F for an additional 5 to 7 minutes on each side, or until pale golden.
9. Transfer to racks to cool completely. Store in airtight containers. Makes about 56 biscotti.
